name: modern-names
description: Foundry VTT module: modern name roll tables and namer macros

scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:tests
scripts.startDevEnv: node scripts/install-quench.js && docker compose --project-directory docker --env-file .env up -d && node scripts/install-quench.js
scripts.1startDevEnv: docker container stop foundry-modern-names-test & docker container rm foundry-modern-names-test && node scripts/install-quench.js && docker compose --project-directory docker --env-file .env up -d && node scripts/install-quench.js
scripts.stopDevEnv: docker compose --project-directory docker --env-file .env down -v docker container stop foundry-modern-names-test & docker container rm foundry-modern-names-test
scripts.pretest:ci: node scripts/install-quench.js && node scripts/restart-foundry-container.js && node scripts/wait-for-foundry.js
